Then, I want a group of 40 small white circles with varying opacity, scattered to look like stars. The center will have a radial gradient circle, transitioning from white to yellow, orange, and then transparent. I’ll add elongated rays, create rings with a light stroke for a subtle effect, and sprinkle in some debris with simple shapes. No text! I’m crafting a JSON object with an "svg" key that’ll hold the SVG content as a string. I need to ensure line breaks are correctly formatted for JSON. I'll start by writing the SVG itself. I’m adding smaller spikes to create shorter rays in my SVG design. I’ll also include small circles as debris in varying shades of orange and white. Finally, I need to ensure proper JSON formatting, handling the escaping of quotes, and deciding whether to include the XML declaration, which I think I might just skip for simplicity!
